movesList.name: charge
inputs: hold direction or button briefly (usually at

movesList.name: dash
inputs: Press Fx2; also signifies a point in a combo

movesList.name: run
inputs: Press Fx2, then hold F; also signifies a point

movesList.name: land
inputs: Signifies a point in a combo where you return

movesList.name: Guard
inputs: --  Press and/or hold B to block high and mid-level attacks;

movesList.name: Recovery --
inputs: Push any 2 attack buttons after being knocked down or up
